title: Vermont celebrates 30 years of care
description: KNYSNA NEWS - When you walk through the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - When you walk through the doors of Vermont Old Age Home in Knysna, you quickly realise that it is more than just a building on a hill - it is a home, a place where love still thrives.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - When you walk through the doors of Vermont Old Age Home in Knysna, you quickly realise that it is more than just a building on a hill - it is a home, a place where love still thrives."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This heartfelt sentiment was shared by Werner Erasmus-Le Grange, chairperson of Vermont, as the centre celebrated its 30th anniversary on Friday 31 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The milestone was especially poignant, given the uncertainty surrounding the future of the home just a year ago. \"Reaching this 30-year mark almost seemed impossible,\" said Le Grange, \"as closing the centre was looming due to financial constraints.\"","html":"The milestone was especially poignant, given the uncertainty surrounding the future of the home just a year ago. \"Reaching this 30-year mark almost seemed impossible,\" said Le Grange, \"as closing the centre was looming due to financial constraints.\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Thanks to the support of the community, dedicated staff, and committed donors, Vermont was able to continue its mission of providing compassionate care for the elderly."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At the event, Ricky van Aswegen, treasurer of Vermont, also expressed his pride in being part of the centre and all that has been achieved.","html":"At the event, Ricky van Aswegen, treasurer of Vermont, also expressed his pride in being part of the centre and all that has been achieved."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"He noted that many other NPOs look up to Vermont, commending its management, staff, and sponsors for their unwavering contribution to the centre's success and remarkable growth over the years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The anniversary celebration was a joyous occasion, bringing together residents, families, staff and supporters. \"Vermont is not just a building; it is a home where love lives, and we are proud to continue that legacy for many years to come,\" said Erasmus-Le Grange.","html":"The anniversary celebration was a joyous occasion, bringing together residents, families, staff and supporters. \"Vermont is not just a building; it is a home where love lives, and we are proud to continue that legacy for many years to come,\" said Erasmus-Le Grange."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Cheers to 30 years! The anniversary event was a joyous occasion. Photo: Deswin Talmaggies","html":"Cheers to 30 years! The anniversary event was a joyous occasion. Photo: Deswin Talmaggies"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dr Andre Brink (left) hands over a long-service award for 30 years of dedicated service to Victoria Geswendt (right).","html":"Dr Andre Brink (left) hands over a long-service award for 30 years of dedicated service to Victoria Geswendt (right)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
